items.title: WhatвҖҷs It Like to Be Killed by NatureвҖҷs Most Brutal Predator
items.author: Kurzgesagt вҖ“ In a Nutshell
items.content:
<article>рҹҢҸ Upgrade your online protection with an all-in-one security app! Get an exclusive NordVPN deal + 4 months extra here: https://NordVPN.com/Kurzgesagt
ItКјs risk free with NordVPNКјs 30-day money-back guarantee!

Visit https://www.youtube.com/@nightshift_kurzgesagt and explore the weird, beautiful, and sometimes unsettling side of history.

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-superpredators/

There is a hidden world filled with monsters you never heard of, from predators who spit acid and shoot harpoons, to armored hunters that devour their prey alive. Deep in the oceans, and even in fresh water from puddles and lakes, these microscopic super predators remained hidden in plain sight, and evolved over the last 2 billion years.

What are the deadliest predators of the microworld, and what kind of bizarre biological weapons have they evolved over the past billions of years?

items.title: The True Cost of War
items.author: Kurzgesagt вҖ“ In a Nutshell
items.content:

items.title: How Are Memories Stored Inside Your Brain?
items.author: Kurzgesagt вҖ“ In a Nutshell
items.content:
<article>Avoid your blindspots and get every side of every story at https://ground.news/nutshell. Subscribe for 40% off unlimited access.

Brighten your space with our new human-made & high-quality Neon Framed Art Prints: https://shop.kgs.link/faves рҹ’ӣ Shop these and more of our handpicked favorites in the kurzgesagt shop!

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-memory/

Memory is one of the strangest abilities you possess. Your brain uses an incredibly complex biological system to preserve moments from your past that no longer exist, allowing you to revisit experiences from years ago. But memories are not always recordings of reality. In fact, every time a memory comes under the spotlight of your attention, it can melt and change a tiny bit.

What exactly is a memory, how is a moment in time stored inside your brain, and why does remembering something slowly rewrite the story of your life?

items.title: The Power of 1%
items.author: Kurzgesagt вҖ“ In a Nutshell
items.content:
<article>What could 1% of the richest countriesвҖҷ income achieve? From malaria vaccines and clean water to renewable energy, a surprisingly small fraction of global wealth could transform millions of lives.
